source_name: CER Renewable Energy Target progress, annual
notes: CER 2024 Renewable Energy Target Administrative Report, State of total renewables chapter. The headline is the reported 2024 renewable generation share across the NEM and Western Australia's SWIS. It is not an LRET compliance percentage and is not mixed with the AEMO NEM-only QED fuel-mix card.
citation: Clean Energy Regulator, Renewable Energy Target Administrative Report 2024.
